steps.t: The mayor stands in the centre of Winter-home, overseeing the events of the Yule Festival. You should speak with the mayor and find out what he wants …
Gareth Rust is in the workers' area in Winter-home, ever toiling. You should tell Gareth Rust that the mayor wants you to spy on him so he will lose h…

The mayor is in the town of Winter-home, in Frostbluff. You should return to the mayor with the evidence you collected of his corruption.
The beggars, now re-hired for the former positions, are around the town. You should quickly tell the beggars that their period of despair is at an end…
Gareth Rust and Daley Utteridge are in the workers' area in Winter-home. You should tell the workers of your success in manipulating the mayor. Things…
